caption: The video features an elderly man with long, gray hair tied back and wearing glasses, speaking into a microphone. He is dressed in a light blue shirt adorned with eagle patterns and a beaded necklace. The background consists of wooden slats, suggesting an indoor setting, possibly a conference room or lecture hall. The man appears to be engaged in delivering a speech or presentation, as indicated by his focused expression and the presence of the microphone. The logo "ORCA" is visible in the bottom right corner, hinting that the event may be related to this organization. The overall atmosphere suggests a formal or educational context.
